source_pr.title: ddl: Pass data race
source_pr.body:
line 162 and line 156 encounter data race.
read at store/localstore/txn.go:96  
write at store/localstore/txn.go:59

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky under the race detector due to concurrent access to shared store/txn state from DDL hook callbacks. This PR stabilizes it by using a separate mock context (with Store set) for the hook code path to avoid data races.
fix_pattern: Avoid sharing context/txn across async callbacks; create an isolated context (and set Store) for hook operations to prevent data races under -race.
analysis:
